payload.description:
## Problem
Optimizer metrics chart appears blank after initial render; users only see legend squares.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Optimizer metrics chart remains visible after render
Scenario: Render optimizer chart with cycle series
Given chart has alignment/accuracy series data
When chart mounts and subsequent layout updates occur
Then lines, labels, and background layers remain visible
And legend remains visible
And chart does not collapse to blank state.
payload.title: OptimizerMetricsChart regression: lines and chart layers disappear after recent axis/tick styling
